//meta: SP2 brand.json template. Copy to <repo-root>/<brand-slug>/brand.json and fill in. Comment fields (keys starting with //) get stripped at parse time.
//brand: Lowercase no-spaces slug. Must match dir name under almanac/ and dispatcher YAML filename.
//voice: Pick from elevenlabs.io/voice-lab. Match brand tonal envelope (OA=Mia wellness, CC=hip-hop punchy, WLH=Charlotte mystical). Voice IDs in use: Mia 052jzHJceQiZr7ltnY0C, Charlotte XB0fDUnXU5powFXDhCwa.
//colors: Primary = accent/emphasis color. Canvas = dark base. Brand-anti-patterns will exclude conflicting colors (OA bans lime, WLH bans warm yellows). Pull from brand site CSS where possible.
//fonts: 2 fonts max per composition. Display = headline serif (Cinzel/Playfair). Body = bold sans (Inter). Must exist on Google Fonts CDN.
//metricool_networks: Which Metricool lanes to schedule on. Options: instagram_reel, tiktok, facebook_reel, pinterest_pin. Omit lanes the brand isn't connected to. WLH=IG only (Twitter dead, TT not connected). OA=TT+IG. Check brand's Metricool connections before listing.
//social_queue: Airtable Social Queue source. Get base_id + table_id from the brand's JonOps container (look in schedule.json or the social-researcher skill). Status enum values must match what the brand's social-researcher writes.
//media_style: photo = Freepik premium stock (most brands). illustration = FLUX-schnell generated (use for cosmic/abstract brands like WLH). If illustration, set illustration_style_suffix below and freepik_priority becomes irrelevant.
//illustration_style_suffix: Only used when media_style=illustration. Single style-prompt string appended to every per-beat image query. Example WLH: 'in the style of mystical art nouveau astrology illustration, ethereal cosmic background, deep indigo violet and antique gold palette, hand-painted celestial scene, vertical 9:16, painterly, no text, no logos, no faces'.
//subreddits: Used by social-researcher for community-research topics. 4-6 subreddits aligned with brand vertical.
//anti_patterns: CRITICAL — injected into Claude script-gen prompt. Be specific. Examples: 'no em-dashes in captions', 'no medical claims', 'no scent/herbal framing — WLH sells wearable merch not ritual'. Each pattern enforced both at script-gen (Claude prompt) and at lint (post-gen check).
//brand_voice: Goes into Claude script-gen prompt. Establish: tone, audience, what the brand sells, what it's NOT (e.g. WLH is NOT aromatherapy). Write tight — every word lands in the prompt.
//music_prompt: Feeds Replicate meta/musicgen. Examples: 'gentle harp arpeggios over warm ambient pads, slow tempo, no vocals' (WLH), 'lo-fi boom-bap with dusty vinyl crackle, mid-tempo, no vocals' (CC). NO VOCALS critical — voiceover collides otherwise.
//beat_sync: Future feature — snap scene cuts to MusicGen drum boundaries. Leave false until magic-stack rollout.
